14.reason: [If inputStream is null (when file not found), this will cause NullPointerException]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [If inputStream is null (when file not found), this will cause NullPointerException]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [If inputStream is null (when FileNotFoundException occurs), this will throw a NullPointerException]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  This line will pass null inputStream if file not found, leading to NullPointerException in FileLexer constructor (scanLines). The program does not exit or handle the error properly.

298.reason: [No handling for unrecognized characters; if no token pattern matches, the position is not advanced, causing an infinite loop in doLexer]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  [No handling for unrecognized characters; if no token pattern matches, the position is not advanced, causing an infinite loop in doLexer]

297.reason: If no token pattern matches the current input, the loop completes without advancing the file position, causing an infinite loop in doLexer(). A fallback to skip or report unrecognized characters is missing.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  If no token pattern matches the current input, the loop completes without advancing the file position, causing an infinite loop in doLexer(). A fallback to skip or report unrecognized characters is missing.

249.reason: If findToken() fails to match any token type, it returns without advancing the lexer's position. This causes the while loop to execute indefinitely, resulting in an infinite loop.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  If findToken() fails to match any token type, it returns without advancing the lexer's position. This causes the while loop to execute indefinitely, resulting in an infinite loop.

294.reason: When the for-loop completes without finding a matching token (all tokenValue are null), the method returns without consuming any characters. This directly triggers the infinite loop in doLexer().

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  When the for-loop completes without finding a matching token (all tokenValue are null), the method returns without consuming any characters. This directly triggers the infinite loop in doLexer().

396.reason: [The pattern "&" will match the first '&' in "&&", causing incorrect error detection before AND can be matched]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The pattern "&" will match the first '&' in "&&", causing incorrect error detection before AND can be matched]

397.reason: [The pattern "\\|" will match the first '|' in "||", causing incorrect error detection before OR can be matched]
